overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character transitioning from a dark service corridor into a luxurious, futuristic high-end fashion retail space with digital billboards, mannequins, and polished interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: character raises arm to open door at end of corridor
approaching bright light from exit doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: character in orange jacket and white cap walking through dimly lit corridor toward the exit

entered.detail: wall with white graffiti text reading BURN CORP SHIT
dark textured wall of the service corridor
doorway emitting bright light at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, dark service corridor with graffiti on the right wall. The character walks steadily forward toward a brightly lit exit doorway at the far end, creating a strong contrast between the dim interior and the light beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury fashion retail lobby with digital advertising displays

events.description: exits dark corridor into brightly lit high-end commercial interior
character walks past first mannequin display on the right

agents.ego_description: character entering the luxurious retail space and walking toward the main display area

notable_agents.action: NPC in colorful jacket standing near illuminated display case

entered.detail: large digital advertisement showing a woman with text JINGUJI and high-heeled shoe
mannequin displaying black formal attire on a stand
contemporary lounge seating with person reclining
bright storefront display with mannequins visible

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor into a spacious, luxurious retail lobby with polished marble floors and warm artificial lighting. A massive digital billboard for JINGUJI dominates the far wall, while mannequins and modern furniture populate the space. Other shoppers are visible browsing the displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: extended retail corridor with seating areas and digital displays

events.description: camera moves past the main billboard and continues deeper into the store
passing by seated shoppers on couches temporarily blocks view of far wall

agents.ego_description: character walking deeper into the retail space, passing seated customers and additional merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: NPC in turquoise jacket sitting on white couch

entered.detail: deeper section of the store with additional lighting and displays
architectural ceiling feature with horizontal wooden panels and integrated lighting

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the extended retail corridor, moving past the initial JINGUJI display. The space features wooden slat ceilings and additional seating areas where shoppers relax. The camera progresses deeper into the store, revealing more of the futuristic commercial interior with its polished surfaces and ambient lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, industrial service area into a sprawling, high-end futuristic retail space. It begins in a narrow, dark corridor marked by graffiti, moving steadily toward a brightly lit exit doorway that creates a sharp contrast with the surrounding gloom. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a luxurious lobby featuring polished marble floors, warm artificial lighting, and a massive digital billboard for JINGUJI. The scene then expands as the camera progresses deeper into the store, gliding past mannequins and browsing shoppers toward a corridor with wooden slat ceilings and ambient seating areas. Finally, the movement continues through the polished interior, revealing the full scale of the futuristic commercial landscape.
